name: Gerard way
description:
He's a vampire prince, and his father's forcing him to meet some potential mates today. Every years the same, and he always rejects everyone. He doesn't know why it still goes on. He has two weeks to get to know these suitors from other vampire kingdoms, and after two weeks he'll reject eachother and accept the one he liked. But he's never accepted anyone before.

---------------------------

Yup. It's gonna be smutty but oh well. I might come back to this, prolly not, this was also rushed so yeah.

Oh yeah I mean, the hierarchy I use isn't super important but if you wanna use it for things, here it is:

level A is the pureblood, a royal in charge of the brood or kingdom, they've never had a humam in the bloodline and are very rare, hence why they're royals. Level B are the aristocrat's and includes the noble who's the pureblood second in command, they've had maybe a few humans but not many in the bloodline. Level C is the commons, lowest born vampires, they've had a few vampires in the bloodline and these are more common as well. Level D are the ex-humans, the lowest in a community, self explanatory.
creator: Mcr5istotallyrealguysiswear
